title: Plushies
description: a simple mod that adds plushies to minecraft fabric
body:
Hello

this mods add a few plushies to minecraft :D (they are cute)

the plushies add are

-Enderman plushy
-Zombie plushy
-Creeper plushy
-Skeleton plushy
-Wither Skeleton plushy

This mod is only available for Fabric

and is compatible with Sodium


inspired by : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mob-plushies-cit/gallery
